cards.summary: Sleep debt accumulating (mean 5.8 h over 9 days) - review sleep hygiene
cards.detail: Mean nightly sleep duration has stayed below the AASM-recommended 7 hours for 9 consecutive days (current mean 5.8 h). Cumulative sleep restriction is associated with impaired glucose tolerance, elevated inflammatory markers, and reduced HRV.

source.label: iOS Lifestyle Medicine - Lifestyle Risk Assessment

suggestions.label: Open lifestyle counseling care plan (sleep hygiene)

actions.description: Create a sleep-hygiene-focused lifestyle counseling CarePlan
